abilities.name: Battle Stance
abilities.description: An aggressive combat stance: you generate 10% more rage. The default stance for Arms and Protection.

abilities.name: Big Boot
abilities.description: A long lofted boot toward the aim point. The crowd loves it.

abilities.name: Dive
abilities.description: Fling yourself toward the aim point. A crossing ball sticks to you.

abilities.name: Feint
abilities.description: A quick sidestep burst toward the aim point.

abilities.name: Fresh Legs
abilities.description: Find your legs: move 50% faster for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Hoof It
abilities.description: Hammer the ball low and hard up the field.

abilities.name: Iron Bellow
abilities.description: A shout that increases the attack power of all party members by X% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Kick
abilities.description: Knock the ball along the ground toward the aim point.

abilities.name: Long Punt
abilities.description: A keeper's punt, high and far.

abilities.name: Pass
abilities.description: Roll a firm pass to your targeted teammate, leading their run.

abilities.name: Reaver Strike
abilities.description: A strong attack that increases melee damage by X. Activates on your next swing.

abilities.name: Shoot
abilities.description: Hold to build power, release to shoot at goal. Too much power sails over.

abilities.name: Shoulder
abilities.description: A fair harvest-truce shoulder. Sends them tumbling off the ball.

abilities.name: Redhand
abilities.description: Instant attack (2 charges) for weapon damage plus X that empowers your next Maiming Strike by 20% (stacks twice). Cannot be dodged.

abilities.name: Onrush
abilities.description: Rushes an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range.

abilities.name: Armor Shear
abilities.description: Sunders the target's armor, reducing it by X% per application. Stacks up to 5 times. Generates a high amount of threat.

abilities.name: Berserker Stance
abilities.description: A reckless combat stance: your critical strikes land 3% more often and hit for 3% more. The Fury warrior always fights in this stance.

abilities.name: Bloodletting
abilities.description: Instantly attack in a blood frenzy for X, healing you for 3% of your maximum health and generating 12 rage. Has a 30% chance to Enrage you. (Fury signature)

abilities.name: Brute Swing
abilities.description: Swings brutally at the opponent for 50% weapon damage plus X, generating 8 rage.

abilities.name: Cleaving Blows
abilities.description: Red Harvest always refunds a charge of Twinstrike. (Fury)

abilities.name: Diabolical Twinstrike
abilities.description: While Enraged, your Twinstrike deals 15% more damage. (Fury)

abilities.name: Goad
abilities.description: Goads the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Guarded Stance
abilities.description: A defensive combat stance: you generate 30% more threat but deal and take 10% less damage. Cast Battle Stance to return to the offensive.

abilities.name: Hobbling Cut
abilities.description: Maims the enemy for X damage, slowing its movement by 50% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Maiming Strike
abilities.description: A vicious strike dealing weapon damage plus X and reducing healing the target receives by 50% for 10 sec. Applies Gaping Wounds (bleed). (Arms signature)

abilities.name: Mayhem
abilities.description: Passive: while Enraged you deal 7% more damage, attack 25% faster and move 10% faster for 4 sec. Bloodletting has a 30% chance to Enrage you; Red Harvest always does. (Fury)

abilities.name: Measured Fury
abilities.description: Your measured fury sharpens your economy: your abilities cost 10% less rage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Quaking Blow
abilities.description: Blasts nearby enemies for X damage and slows their attacks by 10% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Seasoned Soldier
abilities.description: Your critical auto-attacks generate 10% more rage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Shieldcrack
abilities.description: Slam the target with your shield for X and massive threat, generating 15 rage. (Protection signature)

abilities.name: Sudden Death
abilities.description: Your auto-attacks have a chance to let you cast Early Grave on a target at any health, costing no rage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Blood Toll
abilities.description: Generates 10 rage at the cost of health.

abilities.name: Heroic Leap
abilities.description: Leap to the target area, dealing X damage to nearby enemies on landing.

abilities.name: Revenge
abilities.description: Attack in a wide arc, dealing 18 to 24 Physical damage to all enemies in front of you. Above 5 targets the damage is reduced. When you dodge or parry, your next Revenge may cost no rage. (Protection)

abilities.name: Twinstrike
abilities.description: Instantly strike with your weapon twice, each hit dealing 40% weapon damage plus X, and generate 4 rage. Stores up to 2 charges. (Fury)

abilities.name: Die by the Sword
abilities.description: Defensive cooldown: for 8 sec you take 30% less damage and dodge far more attacks.

abilities.name: Jawcrack
abilities.description: Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. Generates 10 rage when it stops a cast.

abilities.name: Raised Guard
abilities.description: Brace behind your shield: you take 50% reduced Physical damage for 6 sec. Stores up to 2 charges. (Protection)

abilities.name: Victory Rush
abilities.description: Strike for weapon damage plus X and heal 20% of your maximum health. Only usable within 20 sec of killing an enemy.

abilities.name: Gaping Wounds
abilities.description: Passive: your Maiming Strike leaves the target bleeding for Physical damage over 6 sec. (Arms)

abilities.name: Bladed Gyre
abilities.description: Spin in a deadly arc, striking all nearby enemies for X at no rage cost. Your next 2 single-target abilities also strike enemies near their target. (Fury talent)

abilities.name: Furious Mending
abilities.description: For 10 sec you take 20% reduced damage, and while it lasts your Bloodletting heals you for 20% of your maximum health. (Fury)

abilities.name: Red Harvest
abilities.description: Spend everything: strike three times in a frenzy for 65% weapon damage plus X each, always Enraging you. (Fury)

abilities.name: Seething Fury
abilities.description: Enter a berserker rage, generating 20 rage. (Warrior talent)

abilities.name: Piercing Howl
abilities.description: A piercing shout that slows all enemies within 15 yards by 50% for 8 sec.

abilities.name: Storm Bolt
abilities.description: Hurl your weapon at the target for X, stunning it for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Breachmaker
abilities.description: Batter the target for weapon damage plus X and crack its guard: your own attacks against it deal 20% more damage for 8 sec. (Arms)

abilities.name: Defiant Bellow
abilities.description: A defiant bellow: every enemy within 10 yards is taunted, compelled to attack you for 3 sec. (Protection)

abilities.name: Direhowl
abilities.description: Lets out a fearsome shout, reducing the damage dealt by all nearby enemies by 20% for 20 sec.

abilities.name: Early Grave
abilities.description: Attempt to finish off a wounded foe, causing X damage. Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

abilities.name: Faultline
abilities.description: Send a shockwave through the ground: enemies in front of you within 8 yards take X damage and are stunned for 3 sec. (Protection)

abilities.name: Intimidating Shout
abilities.description: A terrifying shout that sends up to 5 enemies within 8 yards fleeing in fear for 8 sec. Damage may break the effect.

abilities.name: Iron Resolve
abilities.description: Grit your teeth and ignore the pain: spends up to 40 rage (20 minimum) to absorb 4 damage per rage spent, lasting up to 10 sec. (Protection)

abilities.name: Reaping Arc
abilities.description: A sweeping strike that hits all enemies in front of you for X damage.

abilities.name: Emboldening Roar
abilities.description: Lets loose an emboldening roar: you and friendly players within 40 yards are Emboldened, and your next 3 abilities are guaranteed critical strikes. (Fury)

abilities.name: Avatar
abilities.description: Transform into a colossus for 20 sec, breaking all control on you and increasing your damage dealt by 20%.

abilities.name: Recklessness
abilities.description: Enrage: your rage generation increases by 50% and your critical strike chance by 20% for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Valor Roar
abilities.description: Lets loose a valorous roar, granting you and party members within 40 yards 20% additional maximum health for 10 sec. Protection: they also take 5% less damage for the duration.

abilities.name: Widening Arc
abilities.description: For 12 sec your single-target attacks also strike 1 nearby enemy for full damage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Bladestorm
abilities.description: Become a whirling storm of steel, striking all enemies within 6 yards for X every second for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Sanguine Aura
abilities.description: Imbue your weapon with the blood of your foes: you and your melee allies gain 10% attack speed and 10% damage for 20 sec.

abilities.name: Mending Light
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Oathbrand
abilities.description: Fills you with Holy power for 30 sec, causing each of your melee swings to deal X additional Holy damage. Unleash with Verdict.

abilities.name: Steadfast Aura
abilities.description: Increases the armor of all party members by X% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Oath of Iron
abilities.description: Blesses the party, increasing the attack power of all party members by X% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Verdict
abilities.description: Unleashes your active Seal upon the enemy, consuming it to deal its judgement damage.

abilities.name: Rite of Expulsion
abilities.description: Banishes the wicked with Holy wrath, causing X Holy damage.

abilities.name: Ward of Faith
abilities.description: A holy shield absorbs X damage for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Cleansing Verdict
abilities.description: Purges a harmful magic effect from a friendly target and heals them for X Holy.

abilities.name: Holy Ground
abilities.description: Consecrates the ground beneath you, searing nearby enemies for X Holy damage every 2 sec for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Sundering Gavel
abilities.description: Stuns the target for X sec.

abilities.name: Crusader Strike
abilities.description: Strikes the target for weapon damage plus X Holy damage. (Paladin talent)

abilities.name: Hallowed Wall
abilities.description: Hurls a radiant aegis at an enemy for 90 to 110 Holy damage, then bounces to 2 nearby enemies for 60 to 75 Holy damage each. (Protection signature)

abilities.name: Holy Shock
abilities.description: Shocks a friendly target with Holy energy to heal them, or an enemy for X Holy damage. (Holy signature)

abilities.name: Last Rite
abilities.description: A massive surge of healing: restores X health. 10 min cooldown.

abilities.name: Lightward
abilities.description: Shields you with holy power, absorbing 900 damage for 8 sec. (Paladin talent)

abilities.name: Reproach
abilities.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. (Paladin talent)

abilities.name: Sacred Goad
abilities.description: Goads the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Saint's Ire
abilities.description: Unleashes holy power, damaging nearby enemies for X. (Paladin talent)

abilities.name: Tolling Hammer
abilities.description: Hurls a holy hammer at a wounded enemy for X Holy damage. Only usable below 20% health. (Paladin talent)

abilities.name: Wrathwing
abilities.description: Calls down avenging power, increasing attack power by 60 and spell power by 30 for 20 sec. (Paladin talent)

abilities.name: Lightmend
abilities.description: A quick, efficient flash of Light that heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Burning Oath
abilities.description: Increases the threat generated by your Holy damage by 60% for 30 min. The tanking paladin's cornerstone.

abilities.name: Requital Aura
abilities.description: Surrounds you with holy energy for 30 min, dealing 5 Holy damage to any enemy that strikes you in melee.

abilities.name: Dawnward Ricochet
abilities.description: Hurl a dawnforged shield for X Holy damage and silence the primary target for 2 sec. It bounces to up to 2 additional enemies within 10 yd for 75% damage per bounce. (Paladin talent)

abilities.name: Sacred Bulwark
abilities.description: For X sec, the next enemy hit that would kill you is denied, restoring you to 35% health instead.

abilities.name: Gutting Strike
abilities.description: A strong melee attack that increases damage by X. Activates on your next swing.

abilities.name: Harrier's Guise
abilities.description: Take on the aspect of the hawk, increasing attack power by X for 30 min.

abilities.name: Venom Barb
abilities.description: Stings the target, dealing X Nature damage over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Fell Shot
abilities.description: An instant shot that deals X Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Marten's Guise
abilities.description: Take on the aspect of the monkey, increasing your dodge chance by 8% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Rattling Shot
abilities.description: Dazes the target for X damage, slowing movement by 50% for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Startle Shot
abilities.description: A wild shot that disorients the target for X sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Bristleguard
abilities.description: Increases your dodge chance by 25 percentage points and reduces all damage taken by 30% for 10 sec. (Hunter talent)

abilities.name: Counterfang
abilities.description: Counterattack after the target dodges for weapon damage plus X. Cannot be dodged.

abilities.name: Fettering Slash
abilities.description: Inflicts a wound for X damage, slowing the enemy by 40% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Howling Rage
abilities.description: Sends you into a bestial rage, increasing your attack power by 20% and your pet damage by 100% for 15 sec. (Beast Mastery signature)

abilities.name: Hushing Shot
abilities.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. (Hunter talent)

abilities.name: Patch Up
abilities.description: Patch up your companion, restoring 240 health over 12 sec if it is alive. If it is dead, revive it at 35% health.

abilities.name: Patch Up
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X over 15 sec. (Hunter talent)

abilities.name: Release Companion
abilities.description: Releases your pet back to the wild.

abilities.name: Rime Snare
abilities.description: Places a frost trap at your feet that arms after 1.5 sec. The first enemy to touch it is frozen for 3 sec, unable to move or act. One trap at a time. Lasts 60 sec. (Hunter talent)

abilities.name: Splitshot
abilities.description: Loose a spread at the target area, dealing X Physical damage to enemies within 8 yd. (Hunter talent)

abilities.name: Sureflight Aura
abilities.description: Inspires nearby allies, increasing attack power by 10% for 30 min. (Marksmanship signature)

abilities.name: Wildbond
abilities.description: Begins taming a beast to be your companion. It must be your level or lower and not an elite. Your pet follows you, attacks your enemies, and holds threat of its own. You may have one pet at a time.

abilities.name: Wildfang Rally
abilities.description: Inspires allies within 30 yd with wild strength, increasing attack power by 45 and attack speed by 5% for 5 min. (Hunter talent)

abilities.name: Wyvern Sting
abilities.description: Stings the enemy from range, incapacitating it for up to 4 sec. Any damage breaks the effect. (Survival signature)

abilities.name: Long Draw
abilities.description: A carefully aimed shot that deals X damage.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.description: Rains arrows on the target area for 3 sec, dealing X damage every 0.5 sec to enemies caught in it.

abilities.name: Courser's Guise
abilities.description: Take on the aspect of the cheetah, increasing movement speed by 30% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Fevered Draw
abilities.description: Increases your attack speed by 40% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Dirt Nap
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes X.

abilities.name: Throat Wire
abilities.description: Loop a wire around the enemy's throat, causing X damage now and bleeding it for X over 18 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Wicked Slash
abilities.description: An instant strike for weapon damage plus X. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Duskveil
abilities.description: Conceals you in the shadows: enemies barely notice you, but you move 50% slower. Attacking or taking damage breaks Duskveil. Cast again to step out.

abilities.name: Craven Thrust
abilities.description: Drive your dagger into the target's back for 150% weapon damage plus X. Must be behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Lurker's Strike
abilities.description: Strike from the shadows for 250% weapon damage plus X. Must be stealthed and behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Eye Jab
abilities.description: Strikes the target for X damage, incapacitating it for 4 sec. Any damage breaks the effect. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Ghostfoot
abilities.description: Increases your dodge chance by 50% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Gut Punch
abilities.description: Strike the target for X damage, stunning it for 4 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 2 combo points.

abilities.name: Low Blow
abilities.description: Finishing move that stuns the target. Lasts 1 sec longer per combo point.

abilities.name: Smoke Screen
abilities.description: Vanish into a cloud of smoke, increasing your chance to dodge by 30% for 8 sec.

abilities.name: Boot
abilities.description: Interrupts the target's spellcast and prevents casting from that school for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Contingency
abilities.description: Finishes the cooldown on Swift Heels, Ghostfoot, and Smokestep. (Rogue talent)

abilities.name: Cutthroat Tempo
abilities.description: Finishing move that increases melee attack speed by 30%. Lasts longer per combo point.

abilities.name: Killer's Calm
abilities.description: Focuses your killing intent so your next attack is a critical strike. (Assassination signature)

abilities.name: Mirrored Blades
abilities.description: Unleashes a flurry of blades, increasing attack speed by 20% for 12 sec. (Combat signature)

abilities.name: Red Ribbon
abilities.description: Strikes the enemy for weapon damage plus X, causes bleeding damage over 12 sec, and increases bleed damage taken by 40%. Awards 1 combo point. (Subtlety signature)

abilities.name: Sap
abilities.description: Incapacitates the target for 8 sec. Must be stealthed and out of combat. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Shadecloak
abilities.description: Wraps you in shadows, absorbing 420 damage for 5 sec. (Rogue talent)

abilities.name: Shadeslip
abilities.description: Steps through the shadows toward your target without breaking Duskveil. (Rogue talent)

abilities.name: Swift Heels
abilities.description: Increases your movement speed by 70% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Wraith Strike
abilities.description: Strikes the enemy for weapon damage plus X and briefly increases dodge. Awards 1 combo point. (Rogue talent)

abilities.name: Leaden Venom
abilities.description: Strikes the target with a crippling poison, dealing X Nature damage and slowing its movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Adder's Bite
abilities.description: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 8 additional Nature damage.

abilities.name: Armor Breach
abilities.description: Finishing move that exposes the target, reducing its armor by X% for 30 sec.

abilities.name: Bleed Out
abilities.description: Finishing move that wounds the target, causing it to bleed for X over 16 sec.

abilities.name: Festering Venom
abilities.description: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 14 additional Nature damage.

abilities.name: Smokestep
abilities.description: Melt from sight, entering Duskveil even in combat. You move 50% slower while hidden. Lasts up to 10 sec.

abilities.name: Dirt Toss
abilities.description: Tosses dirt into the target's eyes, causing it to wander disoriented for 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Quickened Blood
abilities.description: Your blood runs hot, instantly restoring 60 energy.

abilities.name: Litany of Resolve
abilities.description: Increases the Stamina of all party members by X% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Smite
abilities.description: Smites the enemy for X Holy damage.

abilities.name: Whispered Prayer
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Dirge of Decay
abilities.description: A word of darkness causes X Shadow damage over 18 sec.

abilities.name: Mindfracture
abilities.description: Blasts the target's mind for X Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Psalm of Warding
abilities.description: Shields the target, absorbing X damage for 30 sec.

abilities.name: Lingering Grace
abilities.description: Heals the target for X over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Anointing
abilities.description: Infuses a friendly target with power, increasing spell haste by 20% for 15 sec. (Discipline signature)

abilities.name: Choirmend
abilities.description: Heals nearby allies for X. (Priest talent)

abilities.name: Gloamveil
abilities.description: Assume a Gloamveil, empowering shadow magic until you shift back. Cast again to return to normal form. (Shadow signature)

abilities.name: Holy Nova
abilities.description: Causes an explosion of Mending Light, healing nearby allies for X and damaging nearby enemies. (Holy signature)

abilities.name: Hushword
abilities.description: Silences the target for 4 sec. (Priest talent)

abilities.name: Last Prayer
abilities.description: Instantly heals you for X. (Priest talent)

abilities.name: Stilled Mind
abilities.description: Makes your next spell free. Lasts 60 sec. (Priest talent)

abilities.name: Terror Canticle
abilities.description: Frightens nearby enemies for up to 4 sec. Damage may break the effect. (Priest talent)

abilities.name: Thoughtburn
abilities.description: Channels shadow energy at the target area, damaging nearby enemies each second for X. (Priest talent)

abilities.name: Litany of Woe
abilities.description: Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing X Shadow damage each second for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Solemn Prayer
abilities.description: A slow but powerful prayer that heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Urgent Prayer
abilities.description: A fast prayer that heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Arc Bolt
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Mending Waters
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Stonebound Weapon
abilities.description: Imbues your weapon with the fury of stone: each swing deals X additional damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Earthen Jolt
abilities.description: Instantly shocks the target with concussive force for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Pyrebrand Weapon
abilities.description: Imbues your weapon with elemental fire: each swing deals X additional Fire damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Rimebound Weapon
abilities.description: Imbues your weapon with biting frost: each swing deals X additional damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Thunder Ward
abilities.description: Surrounds you with crackling lightning: melee attackers take X Nature damage, up to 3 charges and at most once every 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Cinder Jolt
abilities.description: Sears the target with fire for X damage plus X over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Rime Jolt
abilities.description: Instantly shocks the target with frost for X Frost damage and slows its movement by 50% for 8 sec.

abilities.name: Chain Heal
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for 120 to 145, then jumps to up to 2 additional nearby allies, healing for 50% less with each jump. (Restoration signature)

abilities.name: Gripping Earth
abilities.description: Binds nearby enemies to the earth, rooting them for 2 sec. (Shaman talent)

abilities.name: Primal Mastery
abilities.description: Calls on primal mastery, making your next spell instant. (Elemental signature)

abilities.name: Skybranch
abilities.description: Hurls lightning at the target area, damaging nearby enemies for X. (Shaman talent)

abilities.name: Springwell
abilities.description: Restores 120 health to a friendly target over 12 sec. (Shaman talent)

abilities.name: Storm Chorus
abilities.description: Whips your group or raid into a frenzy, increasing attack, casting, and channeling speed by 30% for 15 sec. Allies recently affected by Storm Chorus or Temporal Acceleration are too exhausted to benefit. (Shaman talent)

abilities.name: Shadewolf
abilities.description: Turns you into a Shadewolf, increasing movement speed by 40%. Cast again to return to normal form.

abilities.name: Earthquake
abilities.description: Shakes the target area for 6 sec, battering enemies for X Nature damage every 1.5 sec.

abilities.name: Ancestral Strike
abilities.description: Channels the storm through your weapon, instantly striking for weapon damage plus X.

abilities.name: Cinderbolt
abilities.description: Hurls a fiery ball that causes X Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Hoarfrost Mantle
abilities.description: Encases you in frost, increasing armor by X for 30 min.

abilities.name: Aether Insight
abilities.description: Increases the Intellect of all party members by X% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Rimelance
abilities.description: Launches a bolt of frost, causing X Frost damage and slowing movement by 40%.

abilities.name: Waterbind
abilities.description: Conjures 2 bottles of water, restoring mana when drunk. Higher ranks conjure purer water.

abilities.name: Aether Darts
abilities.description: Launches Aether Darts at the enemy, causing X Arcane damage each second for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Aether Surge
abilities.description: Draws a surge of raw aether through the enemy for X damage. Each cast leaves an Arcane Charge that raises your next Aether Surge's damage and cast speed (5% faster each) but sharply raises its mana cost, stacking up to 4; Aether Darts spends the charges. Each cast can also arm Aether Rush, making your next Aether Surge free and twice as fast to cast.

abilities.name: Aether Surge
abilities.description: Increases spell damage by 20% and spell haste by 10% for 10 sec. (Arcane signature)

abilities.name: Aetherwell
abilities.description: Channel for 6 sec: each second restores 100 mana and builds 8 spell power, stacking while you channel and lasting 15 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Blazing Barrier
abilities.description: Wreathe yourself in flame, absorbing X damage for 60 sec. (Fire)

abilities.name: Brain Freeze
abilities.description: Rimelance has a 20% chance to make your next Winterlash instant and free of its cooldown. (Frost)

abilities.name: Breadbind
abilities.description: Conjures 2 servings of bread, restoring health when eaten. Higher ranks conjure heartier fare.

abilities.name: Cinderfall
abilities.description: Blasts the enemy for X Fire damage. Instant.

abilities.name: Deadfrost
abilities.description: Deep freezes the target, dealing X Frost damage and stunning it for 4 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Fingers of Frost
abilities.description: Rimelance has a 15% chance to grant Fingers of Frost, up to 2 charges: your next Ice Lance treats its target as frozen. (Frost)

abilities.name: Flickerstep
abilities.description: Teleports you 15 yd forward and breaks roots. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Frostveil
abilities.description: Shields you in ice, absorbing X damage for 60 sec.

abilities.name: Hot Streak
abilities.description: Passive: two critical strikes in a row with your Fire spells (Cinderbolt, Cinderfall, Scald, Pyrelance or Flamestrike) make your next Pyrelance or Flamestrike instant and free. The spenders count toward the NEXT streak, free casts included; a Flamestrike counts once however many enemies it strikes, and only the initial impact ever counts. (Fire)

abilities.name: Ice Floes
abilities.description: Your next two spells with a cast time can be cast while moving. Lasts 15 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Ice Lance
abilities.description: Hurl a shard of ice, dealing X Frost damage, tripled against a frozen target. Spends Fingers of Frost, or a charge of Winter's Chill, to treat the target as frozen. (Frost)

abilities.name: Icebind
abilities.description: Freezes all nearby enemies in place for up to 8 sec, dealing X Frost damage. The root breaks after cumulative damage equal to 15% of the target's maximum health, with a minimum of 20 and a maximum of 60 damage.

abilities.name: Ignition
abilities.description: Passive: your spell critical strikes burn the target for 40% of the damage dealt over 6 sec, stacking. (Fire mastery)

abilities.name: Pyrelance
abilities.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes X Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Racing Mind
abilities.description: Makes your next spell with a cast time instant. Lasts 60 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Spellbreak
abilities.description: Counters enemy spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Temporal Barrier
abilities.description: Shifts the target a heartbeat out of the present, a temporal shell absorbing X damage for 10 sec before the timeline snaps back.

abilities.name: Temporal Mend
abilities.description: Draws an ally a moment forward in time, mending X health as the body settles into its healthier future self. (Chronomancy signature)

abilities.name: Aetherburst
abilities.description: A burst of Arcane energy hits all nearby enemies for X Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Bewitch
abilities.description: Transforms the enemy into a toad for up to X sec. The toad wanders and heals rapidly. Any damage breaks the effect. Beasts and humanoids only.

abilities.name: Collective Reversal
abilities.description: Rewinds every fallen member of your group or raid, returning them to life at their body with 30% health and mana. Cannot be cast in combat. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Greater Invisibility
abilities.description: Vanish for 20 sec: removes 2 damage-over-time effects and you take 90% less damage while invisible and shortly after. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Spellsteal
abilities.description: Steals a beneficial magic effect from an enemy, transferring it to yourself.

abilities.name: Temporal Echo
abilities.description: Marks an ally with an echo of a healthier moment, mending X health at once. For X sec, part of the Arcane damage you deal is drawn back through the echo to heal them.

abilities.name: Winterlash
abilities.description: Loose three icy bolts for X Frost damage each and plant Winter's Chill on the target: its next 2 incoming compatible spells treat it as frozen. Brain Freeze makes Winterlash instant and skips its cooldown. (Frost)

abilities.name: Blizzard
abilities.description: Conjures an ice storm at the target area: after a 2 sec cast it rages for 6 sec, dealing 12 to 16 Frost damage each second and slowing enemies by 40%. Each enemy struck shaves 0.5 sec off Frozen Orb, up to 3 sec per cast. (Frost)

abilities.name: Brittle Ruin
abilities.description: Your spells gain 50% critical strike chance against frozen targets. Fingers of Frost and Winter's Chill count as frozen. (Frost)

abilities.name: Frostsweep
abilities.description: Blasts nearby enemies with frost for X Frost damage. (Frost signature)

abilities.name: Perfect Moment
abilities.description: Seize your perfect moment: instantly gain 4 Arcane Charges, and for 10 sec Aether Darts does not consume them. (Chronomancer)

abilities.name: Scald
abilities.description: Scalds the enemy for X Fire damage and quickens you by 20% for 3 sec. Quick to cast, and castable while moving.

abilities.name: Ember Form
abilities.description: Transform into a blazing ember, increasing movement speed by X%. You cannot attack or cast spells while transformed. Recast to return to your normal form.

abilities.name: Ring of Frost
abilities.description: Summons a ring for 10 sec. Enemies crossing its perimeter are frozen for 4 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Cold Coffin
abilities.description: Encases you in solid ice for 8 sec, becoming immune to all damage and effects and removing every harmful effect. Usable while stunned or polymorphed. You cannot act while encased. Recast to cancel. (Mage)

abilities.name: Flamestrike
abilities.description: Calls down a burst of flame at the target area, dealing X Fire damage to enemies caught in the blast. Can critically strike (one strike for the whole blast).

abilities.name: Icy Veins
abilities.description: Increases spell haste by 30% and prevents cast interruption and pushback for 10 sec. (Frost signature)

abilities.name: Phoenix Trance
abilities.description: Combust: for 10 sec your Fire spells always critically strike, including bolts already in flight. Off the global cooldown. These crits build Hot Streak like any other. (Fire signature)

abilities.name: Summon Water Elemental
abilities.description: Summon a Water Elemental to fight beside you, hurling Waterbolts at your target and channeling Water Jet. (Frost)

abilities.name: Temporal Cascade
abilities.description: Sends an echo cascading through your group: the target and up to four of their nearest allies are mended at once and each marked for X sec, drawing part of the Arcane damage you deal back through their echoes to heal them. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Dragon's Breath
abilities.description: Hold to gather a widening breath of flame, then release it in a cone. Longer charges reach farther and deal more damage. Enemies hit are disoriented and damage breaks the effect; maximum charge always critically strikes and counts once toward Hot Streak. (Fire)

abilities.name: Hourglass of Suspension
abilities.description: Place a temporal hourglass at the selected location. Beneath an enemy, it suspends them for X sec in PvE or X sec in PvP and prevents all actions; damage breaks the effect. At your feet or beneath a group ally, it grants stasis for X sec, prevents damage and actions, restores X% of maximum health, and makes cooldowns recover X% faster for you or X% faster for an ally. On empty ground, the hourglass waits for X sec and affects the first valid unit to step on it. The beneficial aura can be removed manually.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.description: Your next spell is amplified by 40% but costs 50% more mana. Lasts 10 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Power Echo
abilities.description: Your next direct spell repeats at 50% power on the same target. Lasts 10 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Rewind
abilities.description: Sends an arcane wave through your group or raid, rewinding time to restore 30% of the damage each ally within 40 yards took over the last 5 seconds (up to 35% of their maximum health). Cannot be a critical effect. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Frozen Orb
abilities.description: Release an orb of swirling frost that drifts forward for 8 sec, dealing X Frost damage each second to nearby enemies and slowing them by 30%. Each striking pulse generates one Icicle. (Frost)

abilities.name: Glacial Spike
abilities.description: Conjure a massive spike of ice, consuming 5 Icicles to deal X Frost damage and freeze the target in place for 4 sec. (Frost)

abilities.name: Meteor
abilities.description: Calls a meteor down on the target area: after a 2 sec fall it deals 90 to 120 Fire damage and Ignites everything it strikes. (Fire)

abilities.name: Temporal Reversal
abilities.description: Rewinds a fallen ally's timeline, returning them to life at their body with a portion of their health and mana, even in the thick of combat. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Glacial Front
abilities.description: Hold to gather a widening front of frost, then release it in a cone. Longer charges reach farther and deal more damage. All enemies hit are slowed by 50% for 4 sec; maximum charge also roots them for 1 sec. (Frost)

abilities.name: Mass Barrier
abilities.description: Shields you and up to 4 nearby allies within 30 yd, each absorbing 130 damage for 60 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Winter's Recall
abilities.description: Finishes the cooldown on Flickerstep, Frostveil, and Greater Invisibility. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Rune of Power
abilities.description: Inscribe a rune of power at your feet for 15 sec: allies standing within 8 yd deal 10% more damage. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Temporal Acceleration
abilities.description: Accelerates the flow of time for your group or raid, increasing attack, casting, and channeling speed by 30% for 15 sec. Allies recently affected by Temporal Acceleration or Storm Chorus are too exhausted to benefit. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Burning Pact
abilities.description: Burns the enemy for X Fire damage and an additional X over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Fiendhide
abilities.description: Demonic skin increases your armor by X for 30 min.

abilities.name: Gloom Bolt
abilities.description: Sends a shadowy bolt at the enemy for X Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Summon Emberkin
abilities.description: Summons an Emberkin under the command of the Warlock. The Emberkin hurls Ashbolts at your enemies from afar. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Blackrot
abilities.description: Corrupts the target, causing X Shadow damage over 18 sec.

abilities.name: Hard Bargain
abilities.description: Converts X health into X mana.

abilities.name: Hex of Anguish
abilities.description: Curses the target with agony: X Shadow damage over 24 sec.

abilities.name: Summon Gloomshade
abilities.description: Summons a Gloomshade under the command of the Warlock. The Gloomshade is a sturdy demon that taunts your enemies and soaks up punishment. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Voidfeast
abilities.description: Devours a magic effect (a beneficial one from an enemy, or a harmful one from an ally) and heals you for 6% of your maximum health. Only usable when there is an effect to devour.

abilities.name: Conflagrate
abilities.description: Consumes your Burning Pact on the enemy to ignite them for X Fire damage. (Destruction signature)

abilities.name: Consume
abilities.description: Drains the target's life, transferring X health to you each second for 5 sec.

abilities.name: Dread Aspect
abilities.description: Transform into a monstrous demon for 20 sec, increasing your spell damage by 20% and casting speed by 20%. Your demon gains 50% damage and 20% casting speed. (Demonology signature)

abilities.name: Dread Chorus
abilities.description: Frightens nearby enemies for up to 3 sec. Damage may break the effect. (Warlock talent)

abilities.name: Gag Order
abilities.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec. (Warlock talent)

abilities.name: Leaden Hex
abilities.description: Curses the target, slowing movement by 30% for 12 sec. (Warlock talent)

abilities.name: Morrowlash
abilities.description: Strikes the enemy for X Shadow damage, then horrifies them for 3 sec. (Warlock talent)

abilities.name: Ruinbolt
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of chaotic fire for X Fire damage. (Warlock talent)

abilities.name: Veinleech
abilities.description: Siphons life from the enemy, causing X Shadow damage over 30 sec and healing you for the damage done. (Affliction signature)

abilities.name: Summon Duskborn
abilities.description: Summons a Duskborn under the command of the Warlock. The Duskborn is a fragile demon that strikes quickly and hits hard in melee. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Duskfire
abilities.description: Instantly blasts the target with searing shadow for X Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Harrow
abilities.description: Strikes terror into the enemy, leaving it cowering for up to 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Sear
abilities.description: Sears the enemy with agonizing fire for X Fire damage. Quick to cast.

abilities.name: Summon Spellhound
abilities.description: Summons a Spellhound under the command of the Warlock. The Spellhound harries enemies from range with Gloombite and excels at hunting spellcasters. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Summon Warfiend
abilities.description: Summons a Warfiend under the command of the Warlock. The Warfiend is a durable melee demon that wades into battle and holds its own. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Rain of Fire
abilities.description: Calls a rain of fire onto the target area for 4 sec, burning enemies for X Fire damage each second.

abilities.name: Summon Pyre Colossus
abilities.description: Binds a Pyre Colossus to your will — a hulking juggernaut with crushing melee and the deepest health and armor of any demon. A long cooldown gates its raw power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Summon Wraithborn
abilities.description: Binds a Wraithborn to your will — an elite demon that rains heavy Shadow damage from afar. A long cooldown gates its devastating power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Wildbolt
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of nature energy for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Wildmend
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Wildward
abilities.description: Places the Wildward on the party, increasing all attributes of all party members by X% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Lunar Tempest
abilities.description: Burns the enemy with moonfire for X Arcane damage plus damage over time.

abilities.name: Wildbloom
abilities.description: Heals the target for X over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Claw
abilities.description: Claw the enemy for weapon damage plus X. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Flense
abilities.description: A stealth opener that rakes the enemy for weapon damage plus X and causes bleeding damage over 9 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Stalk
abilities.description: Enter stealth while in Wolf Form, moving 50% slower. Cannot be used in combat.

abilities.name: Wolf Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into a wolf: agility rises with your level, attack power +8 plus 2 per level, your attacks use energy and combo points, and you generate 29% less threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

abilities.name: Briarguard
abilities.description: Thorns sprout from the target: melee attackers take X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Bruin Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into a bear: armor +90%, greatly increased attack power, your attacks build rage and generate 30% more threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

abilities.name: Concuss
abilities.description: Stuns the target for 2 sec. Bruin Form only.

abilities.name: Gripping Roots
abilities.description: Roots the target in place for up to 12 sec.

abilities.name: Typhoon
abilities.description: A blast of wind knocks back all enemies within 8 yd and dazes them, slowing their movement by 50% for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Bonecrush
abilities.description: A mauling attack that increases melee damage by X and causes a high amount of threat. Activates on your next swing. Bruin Form only.

abilities.name: Bruin Rush
abilities.description: Rush an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range. Bruin Form only.

abilities.name: Craven Roar
abilities.description: Demoralizes nearby enemies, reducing their attack power by 20 for 20 sec. Bruin Form only.

abilities.name: Gladesong
abilities.description: Channels restorative energy for 4 sec, healing allies within 30 yd for 42 to 52 each second. (Druid talent)

abilities.name: Headbutt
abilities.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. (Druid talent)

abilities.name: Lifesap
abilities.description: Living sap wells up in you for 10 sec, restoring 20 of your current resource in waves: mana, Rage, or Energy, and shifting forms does not break it. Sleep, stun, or stasis stills the sap. (Druid talent)

abilities.name: Menace
abilities.description: Menaces the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec. Bruin Form only.

abilities.name: Moonwing Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into a fearsome Moonkin, increasing your spell damage by 20% and your armor by 50%. Lasts until you shift out. Cast again to return to caster form. (Balance signature)

abilities.name: Primal Surge
abilities.description: Unleash a primal surge. In Wolf Form, Energy regeneration is increased by 100% for 10 sec. In Bruin Form, instantly generates 50 Rage. (Feral signature)

abilities.name: Red Haze
abilities.description: Increases attack power by 70 for 15 sec. (Druid talent)

abilities.name: Savage Mending
abilities.description: Restores 180 health over 10 sec. Bruin Form only. (Druid talent)

abilities.name: Swiftmend
abilities.description: Consumes a heal-over-time effect on a friendly target to heal them for X. (Restoration signature)

abilities.name: Fleet Form
abilities.description: Instantly shift into a swift travel form, increasing movement speed by 40%. You cannot use other abilities while shifted, but can shift in or out of combat, ideal for escaping.

abilities.name: Gorebite
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes X. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Rip
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes X Bleed damage over 12 sec. Consumes combo points. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Second Bloom
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X and an additional amount over 21 sec.

abilities.name: Skyfall
abilities.description: Calls down a bolt of stellar fire, causing X Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Oakhide
abilities.description: Your skin hardens like bark, increasing armor by 150 for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Stoke
abilities.description: Generates 20 rage instantly. Bruin Form only.

abilities.name: Sweeping Claws
abilities.description: Sweep your claws through nearby enemies for X damage. Causes extra threat. Bruin Form only.

abilities.name: Dash
abilities.description: Sprint forward, increasing movement speed by 50% for 15 sec. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Galeheart
abilities.description: Calls a hurricane onto the target area for 6 sec, battering enemies for X Nature damage each second.

abilities.name: Slinkstrike
abilities.description: A stealth opener that stuns the target for 2 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Slumber
abilities.description: Forces the target into a deep sleep for up to 8 sec. Any damage will awaken it.

abilities.name: Witchlight
abilities.description: Decreases the target's armor by X% for 40 sec. Does not stack with Armor Shear.

abilities.name: Primal Reflexes
abilities.description: Your instincts sharpen, increasing your chance to dodge by 50% for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Stinging Swarm
abilities.description: The enemy is swarmed by insects, taking X Nature damage over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Wolfsblood
abilities.description: Increases attack power by X for X sec. Wolf Form only.
